title: Clarify SSH command construction
goal: Document or encapsulate remote SSH command construction that uses exec plus shlex.join so safety assumptions and validation responsibilities are explicit.

acceptance.assertion: Remote command construction has a named helper or documented contract with validation responsibilities.
Call sites demonstrate that untrusted command parts are either validated before joining or impossible by construction.
Focused tests cover quoting-sensitive arguments without broadening remote shell authority.

metadata.reason: PR #103 kept existing exec + shlex.join pattern; safety assumptions should be made explicit.
